zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 天哪，你看老板刚才的演讲没？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 看了看了，她真的 pop off 了！数据直接炸裂。

en.speaker: A
en.text: Did you see the boss's presentation just now?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Yeah! She really popped off! The numbers were insane.

definitions.en: To perform exceptionally well; to excel with confidence and energy
definitions.zh: 表现出色、发挥超常、充满自信地展现

definitions.en: To speak boldly and passionately about something
definitions.zh: 大胆表达观点、激情发言

examples.en: Your presentation was fire! You really popped off.
examples.zh: 你的演讲太炸了！真的火力全开。

examples.en: She popped off in the comments defending her point.
examples.zh: 她在评论区火力全开为自己的观点辩护。

examples.en: Pop off, king! You absolutely slayed that performance.
examples.zh: 厉害啊大佬！你的表演真的太绝了。

examples.en: The new restaurant is popping off — there's a two-hour wait every night.
examples.zh: 那家新餐厅火了——每晚都要排两小时队。
